title: Eyes in the Shadows
description: Aldric Vane has a task that will test your skills as a Keeper. Strange disappearances have been reported across multiple towns - Dalhurst, Thornfield, and Millbrook. The pattern suggests a coordinated effort, perhaps a cult or criminal organization. Your mission: investigate each town, find the connection, and report back. But remember - Keepers work unseen. Draw no attention to yourself.

objectives.description: Receive your briefing from Aldric Vane
Travel to Thornfield to continue the investigation
Travel to Millbrook for the final piece
Piece together the clues to find the connection
Report your findings to Aldric Vane

notes: Multi-town investigation quest for Keepers faction. Establishes a cult presence in the region that can lead to future quests.
